creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text: With 1.4.3 taking longer than expected I vote at this point we just MFH the 1.4.3 update and call it good.  "Approved by: ports-secteam" for the attached patch for 2015Q3/lang/go?  Note there are some QA issues noted by Poudriere that lang/go14 on head also has.
